creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
On 06:59 Tue 15 Dec, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/p5-File-ChangeNotify,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/141570 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Recently I've submitted the update patch at ports/141234. Feel free to
commit either this or that patch.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/141570
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Alexey V. Degtyarev
